cases.prompt: Given a target project with outputs/requirement-analysis.md, two historical project themes, and one open-source project-reverse evidence artifact, run synthesize and produce asset-match, engineering, implementation, and decision outputs.
expected_behavior: Uses match-assets, check-license, assess-reuse, and generate-outputs helpers before final writing.
Outputs requirement IDs, candidate assets, reuse level, reuse cost, license status, risks, validation tasks, and evidence paths.
Marks GPL, ELv2, unknown licenses, or unavailable vulnerability lookup as review/risk instead of silently recommending direct reuse.
Writes target-theme outputs and logs the operation only after explicit WRITE-KB confirmation.
